title: Financial dimension framework (DefaultDimension field + display value)
instruction: On the existing ConDemoNoteHeader table, add a DefaultDimension field (Int64, EDT LedgerDefaultDimensionValueSet -- the standard EDT platform tables use for this field, e.g. MainAccountLegalEntity.DefaultDimension). Add a relation named DimensionAttributeValueSet from DefaultDimension to DimensionAttributeValueSet.RecId. Add a display method dimensionDisplayValue() that returns '' when DefaultDimension is 0/unset, otherwise resolves it via DimensionAttributeValueSetStorage::find(this.DefaultDimension).toString(). Never work with dimension strings directly and never hardcode dimension attribute names. Full FastTab UI wiring (DimensionDefaultingController on a form) is out of scope for this case -- it only covers the table-level field/relation/display-method plumbing. The table must build clean.
